violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item stored in an unapproved location. -Cases of juice stored on crate behind shelves is below exposed sewer lines. -Another case of juice stored on crate below sewer lines (between shelf and refrigerator).

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Right side door on cold hold display at coffee shop is damaged and maintained closed with tape. -Broken door handle and gasket at (middle) refrigerator in bakery.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use lids stored directly on service counter for customer use.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Baking pans are stored on top of refrigerator below exposed sewer lines.--Food item stored in an unapproved location. -Cases of juice stored on crate behind shelves is below exposed sewer lines. -Case of chocolate chips is stored on crate between shelves below exposed sewer lines.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Refrigerator under sink found with product temps of 47-52F. *Directed to move whip topping and open juice to other refrigeration. Recommend defrosting unit to see if it improves its temperature control-items must maintain internal temps of 41F or less.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Sour cream is not dated for open date. -Fruit filling is not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Uncured hard salami has expiration date of Nov 17th 2025 and is not date marked for open date.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Right side door on cold hold display is damaged and maintained closed with tape. -Cracking at backsplash caulking behind coffee dish pit sinks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost build up at freezer compartment of under counter small refrigerator. -Residue at handles of refrigeration equipment.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
